about_me_long: Embedded Systems Engineer pivoting to Linux System Administration and IT. I bring a unique full-stack hardware perspective—ranging from RISC-V firmware development and PCB design to Data Center racking and Network Engineering. Skilled in C/C++, Python, and network troubleshooting, I offer a deep technical understanding of how software interacts with hardware, ensuring robust and efficient system management.
about_me_short: Bridging Embedded Engineering and Linux Administration: From RISC-V firmware and PCBs to Data Center operations and IT in particular RHCSA and Active Directory
my_motto: It is the glory of God to conceal a matter; to search out a matter is the glory of kings.
